scripts.test:e2e:mvp: pnpm supabase:reset && GYEOP_NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next/e2e-3111 GYEOP_E2E_PORT=3111 GYEOP_E2E_LIVE=1 playwright test tests/e2e/core-mvp-live.spec.ts --project=mobile-chromium --workers=1
